finalized_plan.description: Ask the search_agent team member to locate Eva Draconis’ YouTube page and identify her personal website URL as listed there
Once the URL is identified, direct the search_agent to navigate to that personal website and locate the top banner image
Use the visualizer tool on the top banner image to verify the symbol description—specifically, a single curved line that isn’t a circle or a portion of one
Search the website (or related pages such as the about page or blog) for any descriptive text, background, or explanations regarding this symbol’s design and meaning
If the website does not contain an explanation, consult external sources such as social media or relevant third-party commentary to uncover the symbolic meaning
Analyze the collected information to determine the intended meaning of the symbol and ensure that this interpretation aligns with the visual evidence
Format the final meaning as a word or phrase without any punctuation
Submit the final answer using the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: The agent fabricate the answer without using search_agent
